VSHS Occupational Health and Safety 1st Class ., Operating Room Services 1st Class ., First and Emergency Aid 2nd Class ., Oral and Dental Health 2nd Class ., SHMYO Medical Laboratory Techniques 2nd Class ., Emergency and Disaster Management 2nd Class .,

About Vocational School of Health Services

It aims to train health personnel in accordance with the needs of our country. These personnel will provide quality health services between the physician and the patient. For this purpose, the quality of the education offered to our students also allows our students to transfer vertically to the Faculties of Health Sciences.

We know that the quality of health services is closely related to the quality of health personnel. In such a case, society will be able to receive quality health services. The ongoing developments and achievements in the field of health in our country for more than ten years have brought this issue to the forefront. The necessity of training staff who can use new technological developments and have good communication with the patient is obvious.

Graduates of Vocational School of Health Services

We receive information about the satisfaction of our graduates with the services they provide in healthcare institutions and hospitals through feedback. We are extremely happy about this. This is very important for the future of our school and our students.

Vocational School of Health Services and Practices

Üsküdar University Vocational School of Health Services utilizes its own laboratories and the laboratories of the Faculty of Health Sciences, which serves in the same building, for applications as well as quality theoretical education. We also benefit from the facilities of NP Brain Hospital and Medical Centers, some University Hospitals and Public Training and Research Hospitals in Istanbul.

Vocational School of Health Services (SHMYO), Çarşı Campus/Üsküdar (Address: Mimar Sinan Mah. Selman-ı Pak Cad. İsmail Dümbüllü Sok. No:4 34664 Üsküdar-ISTANBUL)
